creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-04-29 22:57:04 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/gnomesword      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    misc/gnomesword/files patch-Makefile.in patch-configure 
  Log:
  The GnomeSword GUI is a frontend to the SWORD project.
  
  The SWORD Project is an effort to create an ever expanding software
  package for research and study of God and His Word. The SWORD Bible
  Framework allows easy manipulation of Bible texts, commentaries,
  lexicons, dictionaries, etc.  Many frontends are build using this
  framework. An installed module set may be shared between any frontend
  using the framework.
  
  WWW: http://gnomesword.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/112196
  Submitted by:   Thomas Abthorpe <thomas at goodking.ca>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.851     +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.29      +38 -0     ports/misc/gnomesword/Makefile (new)
  1.8       +3 -0      ports/misc/gnomesword/distinfo (new)
  1.6       +31 -0     ports/misc/gnomesword/files/patch-Makefile.in (new)
  1.6       +128 -0    ports/misc/gnomesword/files/patch-configure (new)
  1.3       +10 -0     ports/misc/gnomesword/pkg-descr (new)
  1.10      +186 -0    ports/misc/gnomesword/pkg-plist (new)
